ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_superuser" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is a superuser */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "is_staff" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is a staff member */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "manager_id" TEXT /* ID of the user's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities and permissions */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* ID of the role to which the permission is assigned */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user to whom the role is assigned */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was assigned */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "removed_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was removed */,
  "removed_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who removed the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_reset_tokens" (
  "token_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each password reset token */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user to whom the token is assigned */,
  "token" TEXT /* Password reset token */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the token was created */,
  "expired_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the token expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_reset_tokens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "trail_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., update, delete, create) */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
